summary: Top‑notch audience tape of a stellar ’91 show with an outstanding Jack Straw.
review: Both reviewers hail this as the best audience recording of the date, noting its clarity and listenability compared to other muddy sources. The performance itself is praised as one of the strongest from 1991, with the rendition of "Jack Straw" singled out as a highlight. Overall the tape delivers both sonic fidelity and musical excitement.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on both the recording (clear, best audience source) and the show (best of ’91 material), though only two brief reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced audience capture; reviewers note it is far less muddy than other tapes and the first listenable source for this date.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing, but overall the show is described as the best material from 1991.
